title: Tunisian Lamb Casserole
description: A hearty Italian-inspired casserole with tender lamb and rich flavors.
instructions: Cook pasta according to package instructions and set aside.
Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add lamb and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add onions and garlic to the pan and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add tomato paste, crushed tomatoes, and Tunisian seasoning to the pan, stirring to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
In a large bowl, combine cooked pasta, lamb mixture, and a little grated cheese (optional). Mix well.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with more grated cheese (if using).
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until cheese is melted and bubbly.
